description_long: This object depicts a stylized adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a dynamic pose, as if caught mid-motion. The figure wears a long-sleeved top and straight pants, with the right arm dramatically raised above the head and the left arm bent outward. The face is simplified, with minimal features, and the hair is styled in a high ponytail. The feet are bare, and the overall form is slender and abstract, with sharp, angular lines. The material appears to be a smooth, matte plastic or resin, giving the figure a modern, sculptural look.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, dynamic pose, and minimalist facial features, wearing a long-sleeved top and pants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised right arm, bent left arm, and clear facial features with a high ponytail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dramatic extension of the right arm and the profile of the face and ponytail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ponytail, and the curvature of the arms and torso.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the length of the raised arm and the side profile of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved fitted top and straight pants
attribute_posture: dynamic pose with one arm raised and one arm bent outward
